behavior_summary: This script implements the in-game behavior for the NPC Stratos. It provides a simple U8P_STRATOS::look/inspect response (U8P_STRATOS::look) and a richer interaction/cutscene flow (U8P_STRATOS::use) where Stratos speaks, may reveal his name, reacts to the player returning the 'Breath of Wind', and can grant a reward (a Focus that enables Air Walk).
U8P_STRATOS::look: when the player inspects Stratos it shows either 'Stratos, the Air Titan' if the global flag stratosName is set, otherwise it shows 'Titan'. The process then suspends.

U8P_STRATOS::use: orchestrates a short staged encounter: background music and SFX are played, the avatar may be put into stasis/levitation (setAvatarInStasis / SetFlag levitateAvatar), the camera is manipulated, timed helper processes are spawned to sequence visuals/sfx, several temporary items are created/previewed/placed (Item::create, Item::pop, Item::legal_create, Item::push, Item::look, Item::move) and a conversation menu is built and presented to the player (local4 menu array, captured into local2). Choices set persistent flags (stratosName, stratosMet, rewardMe, stratosTakenBreath) and can cause U8P_STRATOS::func13AA to run to create/give the Focus reward.

Helper utilities: U8P_STRATOS::func126B implements a small vertical oscillation/levitation loop that moves an item up/down in steps and uses spawn timers for pacing; U8P_STRATOS::func1327 is a short timer/SFX helper that may randomly play ambient SFX while levitation is active; U8P_STRATOS::func13AA is the item-creation/presentation routine that creates and shows the Focus and related temporary items, sequences animations and destroys temporaries.
notable_control_flow: Conversation menu construction dynamically adds/removes options (MenuSet / MenuUnion / MenuRemove) into local4 before calling Ask; the player's selection is captured via SuspendAssign into local2 and dispatched with strcmp/IfStatement to set flags and branch to reward or exposition paths.
Multiple spawn calls to FREE::* helper routines are used with suspend/pid to implement delays between visual steps (timed sequencing rather than blocking loops).

A levitation/movement loop in U8P_STRATOS::func126B increments/decrements a local accumulator (local1) bounded by +/-5 and calls Item::move each step; behavior is gated by the global flag levitateAvatar.

Reward granting is segregated into U8P_STRATOS::func13AA: create/pop/U8P_STRATOS::look/push item operations and timed spawns produce the visible gift, then temporary items are destroyed. U8P_STRATOS::use triggers this helper conditionally based on menu/flags.
Audio effects are gated by checks to avoid overlapping SFX (isSFXPlaying) and U8P_STRATOS::use urandom to add probabilistic variation in U8P_STRATOS::func1327.
open_questions: Exact textual menu options and the full set of strcmp branches in U8P_STRATOS::use — the JSON lists only high-level menu operations and one strcmp; more branches probably exist in the raw but are low-confidence.

Precise mapping of the reward item id (inferred 0x01E1 => Focus) and any inventory vs world-placement logic (Item::push vs Item::legal_create) — this is inferred from calls but not explicitly labeled.
Exact semantics of some spawned METHOD calls (addressof(...)->METHOD::func091C / func15E7 / func03CD): their visual/animation effects are inferred but not concretely named.
Whether some Unknown nodes correspond to camera manipulation or additional actor animations — the structure implies cameraFollowAvatar usage but the decompiled names are ambiguous.

Potential edge cases when stratosTakenBreath or rewardMe are already set: the branching prevents duplicate reward creation but the exact player-visible fallback text is not fully reconstructible from the extracted nodes.

main_function.name: U8P_STRATOS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short in-world inspection text for Stratos and reveal his full title if previously learned.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player inspects or 'looks at' the Stratos NPC (U8P_STRATOS::look event).
Branches on the global flag stratosName to decide whether to display the full name/title or a generic label.

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::look
function_map.role: short inspection handler (shows bark text; respects stratosName)

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::use
function_map.role: primary interaction/cutscene/dialogue process (menu building, flag setting, orchestration of music/camera/items/reward)

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::func126B
function_map.role: timed vertical movement/levitation loop for item animation (Item::move driven by small accumulator)

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::func1327
function_map.role: short timer/SFX helper that may play ambient sounds while levitation is active

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::func13AA
function_map.role: reward creation and presentation routine (creates, pops/places, previews and cleans up Focus and decorative items)

function_map.name: Item::* / playMusic / playSFX / spawn / FREE::* / addressof(...)->METHOD::*
function_map.role: engine subsystems used for items, audio, timers, and method/animation invocation

internal_calls.purpose: Drive item vertical movement/levitation animation during the scene (timed loop using Item::move).
Trigger short timed ambient SFX/short effects while levitation or scene is active.
Create and hand out the reward Focus (presented visually and possibly given to the player) when the dialog flow grants a reward.

external_calls.purpose: Start background music for the encounter (example id 0x73 seen).
Disable or restrict player control during the cutscene sections.
Control camera focus and animated camera movements for staging the encounter.

external_calls.callee: Item::create / Item::pop / Item::legal_create / Item::push / Item::look / Item::move / Item::orStatus
external_calls.purpose: Create, preview, place, animate and/or give item(s) used as the reward or decorative elements during the scene.
Play short ambient SFX (examples SFX ids 0x73/0x74) on a timer with random chance.
Spawn a timer helper process to implement delays between movement steps in the oscillation loop.
Spawn timing/effect helpers to sequence presentation/animations when creating and showing reward items.

reads.name: stratosMet
reads.likely_effect: Controls greeting branches so Stratos can treat the player as already met or unfamiliar.

reads.name: stratosTakenBreath
reads.likely_effect: Determines whether the 'Breath of Wind' return branch should run (prevents repeat handling).

reads.name: rewardMe
reads.likely_effect: Gates whether reward-related dialogue/options are presented/offered.

reads.name: spokenAboutBreath
reads.likely_effect: Used to decide whether to include/offer 'I must have the Breath of Wind' style menu options.

reads.name: stratosName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether the full Stratos title is revealed in U8P_STRATOS::look() and is set when the player asks 'Who are you?'.

reads.name: levitateAvatar
reads.likely_effect: Gates levitation/animation branches and enables oscillation/sfx behaviors during the encounter.

writes.name: stratosName
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player asks for Stratos's name so future U8P_STRATOS::look() calls show the full title.

writes.name: stratosMet
writes.likely_effect: Marked when the player completes the initial meeting/interaction to prevent repeat introductory dialog.

writes.name: stratosTakenBreath
writes.likely_effect: Set when the Breath of Wind is returned to prevent repeated reward/handling.

writes.name: rewardMe
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player requests a reward, used to gate later offering/granting of the Focus.

writes.name: levitateAvatar
writes.likely_effect: Set during the scene to enable vertical movement/levitation animation and related SFX behavior.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the in-game behavior for the NPC Stratos. It provides a simple U8P_STRATOS::look/inspect response (U8P_STRATOS::look) and a richer interaction/cutscene flow (U8P_STRATOS::use) where Stratos speaks, may reveal his name, reacts to the player returning the 'Breath of Wind', and can grant a reward (a Focus that enables Air Walk).
